settings.heading: Our Vision & Mission
settings.body: OUAT envisions a community where children feel welcome and free to dance, sing, and tell stories that bring people together. We exist to provide children and families across Queens with accessible, creative arts education.

settings.heading: OUAT dedicates its support through core programs and community engagement.

settings.title: Creative Programs
settings.body: Programs and seasonal courses in dance, theatre, and art that inspire creativity in young people.

settings.title: Community Engagement
settings.body: Engaging with communities through performances, workshops, and cultural arts experiences across Queens.

settings.title: Personal Growth
settings.body: Supporting children's growth with skilled instructors who foster discipline, mastery, and personal growth.
